during the cold war the united states was led by several presidents including truman kennedy nixon ford carter reagan and bush the soviet union was led by leaders such as stalin khrushchev brezhnev and gorbachev these leaders made decisions that shaped the global political landscape through military and diplomatic actions the cold war was a period of intense rivalry without direct large scale conflict between the two superpowers
